اعْتَقَدَ يَعْتَقِدُ.en: to believe, to think, to consider

ظَنَّ يَظُنُّ.en: to think, to suppose, to assume

أَغْلَى.en: more precious, more valuable, more expensive

قَرَّبَ يُقَرِّبُ.en: to bring closer, to draw together

جَرَّبَ يُجَرِّبُ.en: to try out, to experiment, to test

أَرَاحَ يُرِيحُ.en: to relax, to soothe, to calm

جَمَعَ يَجْمَعُ.en: to gather, to unite, to bring together

اِعْتَنَى يَعْتَنِي.en: to take care of, to look after

سَارَ يَسِيرُ.en: to go, to walk, to follow

دَعَا يَدْعُو.en: to pray / to call / to wish

رَكِبَ يَرْكَبُ.en: to ride, to get into (a vehicle)

قَدَّمَ يُقَدِّمُ.en: to present, to offer, to give

كَبِرَ يَكْبَرُ.en: to grow up, to grow old

ضَاعَ يَضِيعُ.en: to get lost / to be lost

كَلَّمَ يُكَلِّمُ.en: to speak to / to talk to

صَوَّرَ يُصَوِّرُ.en: to photograph / to take a picture

أَكْثَرَ يُكْثِرُ.en: to do too much / to overdo

صَوْتٌ / أَصْوَاتٌ — عَالٍ.en: out loud, in a loud voice

انْقَطَعَ يَنْقَطِعُ.en: to be cut off, to go out

تَمَشَّى يَتَمَشَّى.en: to take a walk; to stroll

مَرِضَ يَمْرَضُ.en: to fall ill; to be sick

أَصَابَ يُصِيبُ.en: to afflict; to hit; to be struck by

جَاعَ يَجُوعُ.en: to be hungry; to go hungry

ابْتَعَدَ يَبْتَعِدُ.en: to stay away; to distance oneself

حَرَصَ يَحْرِصُ.en: to be keen; to make sure

خَصَّ يَخُصُّ.en: to be specific to, to pertain to

تَوَتَّرَ يَتَوَتَّرُ.en: to be tense, to feel stressed

تَعَرَّفَ يَتَعَرَّفُ.en: to get acquainted, to get to know

سَادَ يَسُودُ.en: to prevail, to lead, to dominate

اِبْتَلَّ يَبْتَلُّ.en: to get wet, to become damp

أَوْصَلَ يُوصِلُ.en: to lead to, to deliver, to bring to

أَحْسَنَ يُحْسِنُ.en: to do good, to be good

اِنْقَطَعَ يَنْقَطِعُ.en: to be cut off, to break

خَسِرَ يَخْسَرُ.en: to lose, to suffer a loss

اتَّقَى يَتَّقِي.en: to fear, to be wary of

أَدَّى يُؤَدِّي.en: to lead to, to perform, to fulfill

أَفْسَدَ يُفْسِدُ.en: to spoil, to corrupt, to ruin

سَهِرَ يَسْهَرُ.en: to stay up, to be sleepless

قَلَّ يَقِلُّ.en: to be brief, to be scarce

دَلَّ يَدُلُّ.en: to indicate, to show, to mean

دَرَى يَدْرِي.en: to know, to be aware of

تَنَظَّفَ يَتَنَظَّفُ.en: to clean oneself, to be cleaned

اخْتَلَّ يَخْتَلُّ.en: to come undone, to fall apart

حَضَرَ يَحْضُرُ.en: to attend, to be present, to come

تَمَّ يَتِمُّ.en: to be completed, to be done

اتَّفَقَ يَتَّفِقُ.en: to agree, to come to an agreement

صَادَ يَصِيدُ.en: to hunt, to fish, to catch

اِنْطَلَقَ يَنْطَلِقُ.en: to set off, to dart away

جَرَفَ يَجْرُفُ.en: to sweep away, to carry off

مَنَّ يَمُنُّ.en: to make feel obligated, to reproach

أَفْطَرَ يُفْطِرُ.en: to break the fast, to have iftar

لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ.en: the Night of Power, Laylat al-Qadr

بِسْمِ اللَّهِ.en: in the name of God, Bismillah

تَدَبَّرَ يَتَدَبَّرُ.en: to ponder, to reflect, to contemplate

تَوَضَّأَ يَتَوَضَّأُ.en: to perform ablution, to do wudu

اقْتَنَعَ يَقْتَنِعُ.en: to be convinced, to be persuaded

أَقْبَلَ يُقْبِلُ.en: to come, to approach, to advance

تَوَكَّلَ يَتَوَكَّلُ.en: to put one's trust (in God), to rely upon

زَادَ يَزِيدُ.en: to increase, to add, to grow

رَاقَبَ يُرَاقِبُ.en: to watch over, to monitor, to observe

أَمَّ يَؤُمُّ.en: to lead (in prayer), to be imam

قَدَرَ يَقْدِرُ.en: to be able, to be capable

تَفَكَّرَ يَتَفَكَّرُ.en: to think, to reflect, to ponder

ازْدَادَ يَزْدَادُ.en: to increase, to grow, to multiply

آنَسَ يُؤْنِسُ.en: to keep company, to comfort, to cheer

تَبَرَّعَ يَتَبَرَّعُ.en: to donate, to volunteer a contribution

أَطْلَقَ يُطْلِقُ.en: to launch, to release, to fire

اِشْتَعَلَ يَشْتَعِلُ.en: to ignite, to blaze, to break out

رَكَّبَ يُرَكِّبُ.en: to install, to mount, to assemble

اعْتَنَى يَعْتَنِي.en: to take care of, to look after

أَتْقَنَ يُتْقِنُ.en: to master, to be skilled at

رَضِيَ يَرْضَى.en: to be satisfied, to be pleased

شَطَبَ يَشْطُبُ.en: to cross out; to strike off

صَحَا يَصْحُو.en: to wake up; to become sober

قَطَّعَ يُقَطِّعُ.en: to cut up; to cut into pieces

كَبْسَةٌ / كَبْسَاتٌ.bs: kabsa (arapsko jelo od riže i mesa)

أَوْقَدَ يُوقِدُ.en: to light; to kindle; to fire

عَيَّنَ يُعَيِّنُ.en: to indicate; to determine; to appoint

تَقَاسَمَ يَتَقَاسَمُ.en: to share; to divide among themselves

اِنْتَقَلَ يَنْتَقِلُ.en: to move; to transfer; to pass on

نَحَتَ يَنْحِتُ.en: to carve; to sculpt; to chisel

اهْتَرَأَ يَهْتَرِئُ.en: to wear out / to become worn

نُقُوطٌ.bs: bajramluk; poklon u novcu za bajram

قَوِيَ يَقْوَى.en: to become strong; to be strengthened

تَجَوَّلَ يَتَجَوَّلُ.en: to roam; to wander; to stroll
